name: Cheddar
description: Subscription management and recurring billing API for SaaS with usage tracking and automated invoicing.

seo.title: Cheddar — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Cheddar: Subscription management and recurring billing API for SaaS with usage tracking and automated invoicing.

when_to_use: Usage-based billing with metered event tracking for API products
Subscription management with automated invoicing for SaaS platforms
In-app usage tracking with billing engine integration for developer tools
Dunning and retry automation for recurring SaaS subscription charges

pros: Developer-friendly REST API with clear usage tracking
Simple pricing compared to enterprise alternatives
Handles overage and tiered pricing cleanly
cons: Product has seen limited investment recently
UI and docs feel neglected versus modern rivals
Small community; support can be slow
review.verdict: Workable niche API for metered SaaS billing, but stagnation makes it a risky long-term bet.
review.best_for: Small SaaS with usage-based pricing needing a lean billing API and modest scale.
review.not_for: Enterprise teams or anyone wanting an actively evolving platform with broad integrations.
